name: OpenCode
description: Open-source, provider-agnostic AI coding agent for the terminal. Go-based TUI, 75+ LLM providers, LSP integration, session management.

name: Junie CLI
description: JetBrains' LLM-agnostic terminal coding agent. BYOK model, MCP integration, custom agents/skills, one-click migration from Claude Code.

name: Gemini CLI
description: Google's open-source AI agent bringing Gemini models to the terminal. ReAct loop, MCP servers, free tier with Gemini 2.5 Pro.

name: Kilo Code CLI
description: AI coding agent with built-in sub-agent orchestration. Code, Plan, and Debug agents auto-delegate without a separate orchestrator.

name: cmux
description: Terminal built for running multiple AI agents simultaneously. Vertical tabs with git branch status, notification rings, split panes, Unix socket API.

name: Ghostty
description: Fast, GPU-accelerated, cross-platform terminal emulator with platform-native UI. Written in Zig. Non-profit backed.

name: Termdock
description: Terminal-centric AI dev environment unifying multi-workspace management, terminal layouts, Git visualization, and AST search via Tree-sitter.

name: Octrafic
description: CLI for natural-language API testing. Describe tests in English, runs against OpenAPI specs, Swagger, GraphQL, or live endpoints. Single Go binary.

name: Clanker CLI
description: Autonomous DevOps agent for querying infrastructure across AWS, GCP, Azure, and Kubernetes in natural language. Read-only by default.

name: ty
description: Extremely fast Python type checker and language server written in Rust by Astral. 10-100x faster than mypy/Pyright. Intersection types, Jupyter support.

name: uv
description: Extremely fast Python package and project manager in Rust. Replaces pip, pip-tools, pipenv, poetry, and pyenv in a single tool.

name: Devbox
description: Create isolated, reproducible dev environments using Nix packages without learning Nix. Declare tools in devbox.json, run devbox shell.

name: Prowler
description: CLI for cloud security assessments across AWS, Azure, and GCP. Checks against CIS, GDPR, HIPAA compliance standards.
